name: corrected-wide-v3-external-drat-teeth-v2

v1_result.reason: the real CNF is UNSAT by input unit propagation, so deleting its one-line DRAT leaves a still-verifiable input

positive_reproduction.gate: exit zero and stdout contains s VERIFIED

negative_control.rationale: bind the exact proof to an intentionally satisfiable CNF rather than deleting a redundant proof line from an already unit-refutable CNF
negative_control.proof_policy: reuse the exact unmodified two-byte real proof
negative_control.gate: stdout must not contain s VERIFIED
negative_control.observation_policy: preserve exact stdout, stderr, exit code, byte counts, and hashes regardless of outcome

claim_limits: This post-result control repairs only the rejected teeth test; it does not turn the one-query positive result into coverage evidence.
The substituted satisfiable CNF is a checker sanity control, not a mutation of the source query.
The v1 rejection remains part of the record and cannot be replaced or hidden.
No timing is performance evidence and no access-controlled proof bytes are committed.
